Skip to contents
md.tools 0.1.0
  • Reference

Function reference

All functions

exp_series_data_1
Masked data for a series system with exponentially distributed nodes.
is_md()
Test whether an object is a masked data (tbl_md).
md()
Constructor for masked data.
md_boolean_matrix_to_list()
Map Boolean matrix mat to a list of integer vectors.
md_cand_contains()
Decorates masked data with whether candidate set contains failed component.
md_cand_sizes()
Decorates masked data with candidate sizes
md_decode_matrix()
Decodes a matrix from specified columns in a data frame.
md_encode_matrix()
Encodes a matrix as a data frame with specified columns.
md_latent()
Obtain a list of latent variables from masked data.
md_list_to_boolean_matrix()
Map list of integer vectors to Boolean matrix.
md_mark_latent()
Mark a variable in a masked data frame as latent.
md_par_ttf()
Generates time-to-failure (ttf) and component cause of failure for a parallel system with the given data frame of component times-to-failure encoded by the matrix columns prefixed with var in masked data frame md.
md_read_csv_with_meta()
Read a (masked) data frame table from a connection (e.g., url or filename).
md_series_ttf()
Generates time-to-failure (ttf) and component cause of failure for a series system with the given data frame of component times-to-failure encoded by the matrix columns prefixed with var in masked data frame md.
md_unmark_latent()
Mark a variable in a masked data frame as latent.
md_write_csv_with_meta()
Write data frame object to a CSV (comma separated file), optionally with associated attribute data (stored as JSON in comments)
print(<tbl_md>)
Print method for masked data (tbl_md).

Developed by Alexander Towell.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.3.
